_description: Hepatitic pattern — alcoholic liver disease. Heavy drinker, AST>ALT ratio >1, high GGT. Straightforward diagnosis. Expected: no dilemma, ALD diagnosis, monitoring required.
_expected_path: GP_REFERRAL → EXTRACT → RED_FLAG(no) → TRIAGE → GP_LETTER → LFT_PATTERN(hepatitic) → HEPATITIC_INVESTIGATIONS → DILEMMA(no) → CONSULTATION → EDUCATION → MONITORING(yes) → SURVEILLANCE
